    def open_order(page: Page, order_id: str) -> None:
        """
        Opens the specified order and validates it.
        """
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "complementary"
        ).get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Orders",
            exact=True
        ).click()
    
        order_grid = page.get_by_role("grid")
    
        expect(order_grid).to_be_visible()
    
        order_button = order_grid.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name=order_id,
            exact=True
        )
    
        expect(order_button).to_be_visible()
    
        order_button.click()
    
        # Validate tab title
    
        order_tab = page.get_by_title(order_id)
    
        expect(order_tab).to_be_visible()
    
        tab_order = order_tab.get_attribute("title")
    
        assert tab_order == order_id
    
        # Validate Order Header
    
        order_header = page.get_by_text(
            f"Order #{order_id}"
        )
